app.name: Feedbot
app.tagline: Turn community chat into a structured product backlog.

common.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

login.title: Sign in to Feedbot
login.subtitle: We'll email you a magic link. No password needed.
login.sent_subtitle: If an account matches {{email}}, a sign-in link has been sent. Open it on this device to keep the cross-device protection active.
login.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

magic.failed_subtitle: Magic links expire after 15 minutes and can only be used once.

security.title: Active sessions
security.subtitle: Each entry is a browser where you're signed in. Revoke any you don't recognise.
security.sign_out_all_confirm: This will end every other Feedbot session for your account. Continue?

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty_subtitle: Create your first project to start receiving feedback.

create_dialog.title: Create a project
create_dialog.slug_help: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens. Used in URLs.
create_dialog.slug_invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, dashes, underscores.

delete_dialog.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete_dialog.body: This permanently deletes the project, every feedback, every API key, and every chat link. This cannot be undone.

feedbacks.title: Feedback
feedbacks.empty: No feedback yet — connect a Telegram chat to start receiving.

team.title: Team

invite_dialog.title: Invite a teammate
invite_dialog.role_member: Member — see and triage assigned projects only

team.transfer_owner_body: You'll be demoted to admin. The new owner can promote you back.

llm.title: LLM auto-triage
llm.api_key_set: Stored — key is encrypted and never shown again.
llm.monthly_budget_help: Stop calling the provider when this month's running cost reaches this number. Leave empty for no cap.

errors.503: The server is unavailable. Try again shortly.
